name: Tatsunecro
desc: If this Normal Summoned/Set monster would be used as Synchro Material, 1 monster in your hand can be used as 1 of the other materials. If you do this, all materials for that Summon are banished instead of being sent to the GY. You cannot Special Summon monsters, except Zombie monsters.
mnst_eff: If this Normal Summoned/Set monster would be used as Synchro Material, 1 monster in your hand can be used as 1 of the other materials. If you do this, all materials for that Summon are banished instead of being sent to the GY. You cannot Special Summon monsters, except Zombie monsters.
eff: If this Normal Summoned/Set monster would be used as Synchro Material, 1 monster in your hand can be used as 1 of the other materials. If you do this, all materials for that Summon are banished instead of being sent to the GY. You cannot Special Summon monsters, except Zombie monsters.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Uses cards in the hand as Synchro Materials
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
